title: IIT Kanpur Senior Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Senior Project Engineer Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Engineering Stream OR M.E./M. Tech. in Electrical/Electronic Engineering with 3 years experience OR B.Tech. in Electrical/Electronic Engineering with 5 years experience.
qualification.details: Senior Project Engineer: Ph.D. (Engineering Stream) M.E./M. Tech. in Electrical/Electronic Engineering with a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience. B.Tech. in Electrical/Electronic Engineering with a minimum of 5 years of relevant experience. Experience in power electronics, electrical motor design (e.g., 2/3-phase small BLDC motor), PCB design using Eagle/Altium or similar software, control electronics, and embedded systems. Hands-on experience in motor and electronics testing and debugging, conceptualization and design of experiments, data analysis, interpretation, and presentation. Desirable qualifications: Experience in medical device development and knowledge of the biomedical product lifecycle. Proficient in software tools such as LT Spice and STM32cubeIDE. Excellent oral and written communication skills and the ability to work effectively in a multidisciplinary and collaborative research environment.

salary_details.details: INR 38800-3200-96400 per month (consolidated). A higher starting salary may be considered for exceptionally qualified/experienced candidates as per IIT Kanpur norms.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Senior Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Senior Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 02 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Senior Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Engineering Stream, or an M.E./M. Tech. in Electrical/Electronic Engineering with 3 years of experience, or a B.Tech. in Electrical/Electronic Engineering with 5 years of experience.

faq.question: Q3. How should I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to email their Curriculum Vitae (CV), Cover letter, and Proof of relevant work experience to [email protected].

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this position?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary offered is in the range of INR 38800-3200-96400 per month. A higher starting salary may be considered for exceptional candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What specific experience is required for the Senior Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: Experience in power electronics, motor design, PCB design, control electronics, and embedded systems is required. Hands-on experience in testing, experiment design, and data analysis is also crucial.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any desirable qualifications for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, experience in medical device development and proficiency in LT Spice and STM32cubeIDE are considered desirable. Excellent communication skills are also a plus.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment, indicating that the position is tied to a specific research project at IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply if I have a B.Tech. degree?
faq.answer: Yes, if you have a B.Tech. in Electrical/Electronic Engineering with at least 5 years of relevant experience, you are eligible to apply.
